codeReview.summary: The About page implementation broadly matches the intended structure, but one explicit formation-lineage requirement from the feature description is missing.

issues.description: The feature description requires Exosphere lineage to be stated as multi-week to 2-month intensives with Skinner Layne, but the Exosphere section omits Skinner Layne. This leaves the formation-lineage requirement incomplete.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The content-worker procedure requires manual verification (including link checks and 375px mobile rendering), but this run recorded no interactive checks while still marking followedProcedure true.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: content-worker SKILL.md:38-43 requires manual checks; handoff 2026-03-10T22-48-28-427Z__page-about__eda34ff4-c4f5-473a-a8d9-564683f1ca19.json:41 has "interactiveChecks": []; line 59 has "followedProcedure": true.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Important required details can be present in feature description but absent from expectedBehavior, increasing risk of partial implementations passing worker self-checks.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:346 requires Exosphere lineage "with Skinner Layne"; features.json:351-356 expectedBehavior only requires Exosphere/Volta/Modern Minuteman to be mentioned.

summary: Fail: the About page omits the required Skinner Layne detail in the Exosphere formation-lineage section.
